Our Story

Trusted Catering Services in Ulwe, Navi Mumbai

Based in Ulwe, Navi Mumbai, Shree Caterers & Decorators has been bringing joy to celebrations across the city for over a decade. From lavish wedding banquets to cosy birthday parties, we handle every detail — food, décor, and service — so you can be fully present in your special moment.

Our team of experienced chefs crafts authentic, hygienic, and delicious meals using fresh local ingredients. We believe every event deserves the very best, regardless of size or budget.

🌿 Veg & Non-Veg Menus 💐 Event Decoration 🍛 Live Food Counters 📦 Tiffin Service 🏠 Home Delivery 🎪 Pandal Setup
Get a Free Quote Call +91 81695 30427
What We Do

Services We Offer

Catering & decoration services tailored for every occasion in and around Navi Mumbai.

01
💍

Wedding Catering

Full wedding catering from haldi & mehendi to reception. Custom menus, live counters, and staffed service for 50 to 2,000+ guests.

Enquire Now →
02
🎂

Birthday & Parties

Make every celebration memorable. We provide customised menus, snack counters, and themed setups for birthday parties, baby showers & more.

Enquire Now →
03
🏢

Corporate Events

Professional catering for office meetings, product launches, annual days, and corporate get-togethers. Hygienic, on-time, hassle-free.

Enquire Now →
04
💐

Event Decoration

Floral arrangements, stage décor, table setups, lighting, and themed decoration for weddings & all social events across Navi Mumbai.

Enquire Now →
05
🍛

Tiffin & Home Delivery

Daily tiffin service and bulk home delivery for families, offices, and housing societies in Ulwe, Sector 17, and surrounding areas.

Enquire Now →
06
🛕

Pooja & Religious Events

Prasad, satvik food, and full catering for griha pravesh, pooja ceremonies, and religious gatherings. Pure veg options available.

Enquire Now →

Common Questions

FAQ — Caterers in Navi Mumbai

Everything you need to know before booking us for your event. Still have a question? Just call or WhatsApp us.

📞 Quick Answer? Call us at +91 81695 30427 — we're available 7 days a week, 8 AM to 9 PM.
📞 Call Now 💬 WhatsApp Us
Where is Shree Caterers & Decorators located? +

We are located at Plot No 67, Shop No 2, Tulsa Namdev Residency, Sector 17, Main Road, Ulwe, Navi Mumbai – 410206, Maharashtra. We serve clients across Ulwe, Panvel, Kharghar, Belapur, Uran, and all of Navi Mumbai.

What catering services do you offer in Navi Mumbai? +

We offer wedding catering, birthday party catering, corporate event catering, pooja & religious event catering, daily tiffin delivery, and full event decoration services across Navi Mumbai and Panvel.

How many guests can you cater for? +

We cater for events ranging from small intimate gatherings of 20 guests to large weddings and corporate events of 2,000+ guests. Our team and equipment scale to match your event size perfectly.

Do you offer both vegetarian and non-vegetarian menus? +

Yes! We offer pure vegetarian, Jain, and non-vegetarian menus. We also provide satvik meals for religious events, customised dietary options, and live food counters for all preferences.

How do I book Shree Caterers for my event? +

Call or WhatsApp us at +91 81695 30427, email at shreecaterers@gmail.com, or fill in the enquiry form on this page. We respond within 2–4 hours and provide a free customised quote.

Are you FSSAI certified? Is your food hygienic? +

Yes, Shree Caterers & Decorators is FSSAI certified. We follow strict hygiene protocols in our kitchen and during all on-site food preparation and service to ensure the safety of every guest.
